original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Guideline for Perioperative Care for People with Diabetes Mellitus Undergoing Elective and Emergency Surgery
original_registry_entry.population: People with diabetes mellitus undergoing elective or emergency surgery, with adult-focused pathways and separate paediatric requirements.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Primary-care referral, surgical consultation, preoperative assessment, hospital admission, perioperative care, discharge, and follow-up.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for clinician-documented diabetes type, recent review, HbA1c, medicines and devices, BMI, blood pressure, renal function, comorbidities, complications, and an individualized shared perioperative plan. Medicine changes and doses are not mapped; UAE pathways remain local.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations for primary care teams
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting diabetes type, care provider, last review, HbA1c, current medicines and devices, BMI, blood pressure, kidney function, comorbidities, and diabetes complications at referral.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations for surgical outpatients and preoperative assessment
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician review of diabetes, comorbidities, relevant results, medication reconciliation, and a patient-involved individualized perioperative plan without generating medicine changes or doses.

title: Guideline for Perioperative Care for People with Diabetes Mellitus Undergoing Elective and Emergency Surgery
population: People with diabetes mellitus undergoing elective or emergency surgery, with adult-focused pathways and separate paediatric requirements.
intended_setting: Primary-care referral, surgical consultation, preoperative assessment, hospital admission, perioperative care, discharge, and follow-up.
access_limitations: Algorithm or figure references preserved as locators; diagram structure not interpreted
